channel.title: Debugging on yduman.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Debugging on yduman.dev

item.title: My Debugging Workflow with Agents
item.description:
Note
This post is fully written by me and was checked for typos and grammar errors with Claude.

Debugging is where agents shine a lot. I briefly touched on this in my previous post and I think this topic deserves its own deep dive, because the workflow is more nuanced than just “paste the error and let the agent fix it”. Over months of real-world usage, I developed three levels of debugging that I apply based on how nasty the bug is.
